englishDefinitions: To continue or resume Jenny's story after an interruption or to take up the narration from where it left off.
persianTranslation: از جایی که داستانِ جنی قطع شده ادامه دادن
examples: After the break, she picked up Jenny's story and kept talking.
The interviewer asked him to pick up Jenny's story from the beginning.
Let's pick up Jenny's story after lunch.
